creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
On Thu, Jun 07, 2001 at 12:05:39PM -0500, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> Is this the latest version currently?

	Unfortunaly, yes. I've made a port of the latest but it is
BROKEN. It builds but core dumps.
	I kept the PR open not to forget that it needs working.
I could close it if the project thinks I should. I just thought
I was not disturbing. Also, this keeps ppl aware that someone is
responsible about it since I am active on dealing with my PRs aside
from this particular broken one. :)
	I tried to contact the kicq project but got no reply. I am
hoping for a more updated version.

	Regards,

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - UnB - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
lioux at ( freebsd dot org | linf dot unb dot br )
flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
feature, n: a documented bug | bug, n: an undocumented feature
